title:
Lesson 1:
I'll Pick You Up / Don't Go
description: 'Voy por ti' = I'm coming to pick you up / I'll go get you. 'Ven por mí' = Come pick me up / Come get me. 'No te vayas' = Don't go (to someone who is about to leave). 'No vayas' = Don't go (telling someone not to go somewhere).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How are you going to get to the airport?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I don't know. Can you come pick me up?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Claro. Voy por ti a las cinco.
dialogue.english: Of course. I'll pick you up at five.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Perfecto. No te vayas sin avisarme.
dialogue.english: Perfect. Don't leave without letting me know.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Y no vayas al aeropuerto solo si puedo ir.
dialogue.english: And don't go to the airport alone if I can go.

vocabulary.english: I'll pick you up / I'm going to get you
come pick me up / come get me
don't go / don't leave (you're about to)
